mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO settlement ( workshop_id, monthly, origin_commission, adjust_amount, bill_date, status ) SELECT p.workshop_id, p.monthly, SUM(p.commission_amt),
#{adjustAmount}
0
, NOW(), '정산중' FROM profit p WHERE p.workshop_id = #{workshopId} AND p.monthly = #{monthly} GROUP BY p.workshop_id, p.monthly
mapper.update: UPDATE settlement SET adjust_amount = #{adjustAmount}, status = #{status}, admin_checker_id = #{adminCheckerId}, adjust_check = true WHERE settlement_id = #{settlementId} AND adjust_check = false
mapper.select: SELECT monthly, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '정산완료' THEN final_amount ELSE 0 END) AS approvedAmount, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '환불' THEN adjust_amount ELSE 0 END) AS refundAmount FROM settlement GROUP BY monthly ORDER BY monthly
